text:
August 21
I always feel sad when I hang out with maddie. At least at the end. Empty. Alone. What was that. And what was she thinking. Is it the last time? Was she wanting it to be over the whole time. These banana breads are so good. And he gave me two. Two! Just because. Down to 97/5 lbs. More good news. Turns out it was because of my period. That’s the same weight it said when the cork was under it, so I’m a little suspicious.

Finally an ironic and not just a sad situation to be a part of. Trying to friend zone someone you’re into and they want to have sex with you “You were into me the whole time! This is why women can’t be friends with men.” missing I want to be back at the beach with Sean when I said “I wish this day would end.”

Thinking about the day I skipped school (college lol) and traveled by bus to some store, it was kind of windy - or sunny - I don’t remember - went through all the aisles, looked at everything - god ideas - for the dolls - to make the doll for Brenda - with the charlie doll. That’s what I referred in my mind when people ask me about leaving school. And I always had the same answer that no one understood - “yeah, I like it” like going on a field trip. And I refused to understand
@@PB@@
why they looked at me with these confused eyes. “Yeah - I like it. I get to do whatever I want. I just kind of wake up…” and it was that day I was thinking about. Sort of like when I told Elizaveta that my job was performance art - meeting people. And then left “like this” An example
